visual_dna.product_description: The Pigeon Air Fryer is a modern kitchen appliance designed for versatile cooking functions, including frying, defrosting, roasting, grilling, and baking. It features a sleek, compact design with a glossy black finish accented by gold trim, making it both functional and aesthetically pleasing. The digital touch interface on the top provides easy control of settings, while the pull-out basket with a handle ensures convenience and safety during use.

materials.texture_description: smooth and polished surface with minimal texture

lighting.shadow_characteristics: soft shadows cast below and to the right
highlights: on the top surface and gold accents

structure.overall_shape: rounded rectangular body with a slightly tapered top

motion_recommendations: slow 360-degree rotation to showcase the design
zoom in on the digital interface to highlight controls
pull-out motion of the basket to demonstrate functionality
camera_angle_suggestions: front angle to display the logo and handle
top-down angle to highlight the digital interface
side angle to emphasize the gold trim and overall shape
